chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1567 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-15041/2016 2. For orders on office objections 3. For katcha peshi. 31.10.2016. Mr. Imran Ashraf Panhwar, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G = In the present petition, the main grievance of the petitioners is that they have contracted a freewill marriage and the private respondents No.1 to 7, who are relatives of petitioner No.1 are causing continuously harassment to the petitioners, particularly petitioner No.2 and the official respondents are not providing protection to them agaisnt the private respondents. Today, the learned Additional A.G Sindh has filed the statement alongwith comments on behalf of officials respondents No.8 & 9, wherein the official respondents have denied the allegations leveled agaisnt them by the petitioners, however, in the said comments they have undertaken to provide legal protection to the petitioners as and when approached by them. On this statement, the petitioners’ Counsel is satisfied. Consequently, instant constitutional petition is disposed of with direction to official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and should provide protection to the petitioners, if the petitioners approach them with such a request. The private respondents No.1 to 7 are also restrained from causing any harassment to the petitioners. JUDGE Shahid
